name: patch_management
description: a vulnerability patch-management world by severity; actions scan, patch, defer, verify

card.description: a vulnerability patch-management world by severity; actions scan, patch, defer, verify

rules: Vulnerabilities are tracked by severity: critical, high, medium, low.
Each vulnerability lives in exactly one pool: unscanned, open, patched, deferred, or verified.
scan moves every unscanned vulnerability into the open backlog (latent risk becomes known risk).
patch remediates one open vulnerability, choosing the highest severity first (open -> patched).
defer postpones one open vulnerability, choosing the lowest severity first (open -> deferred).
verify confirms all applied patches as remediated (patched -> verified).
Risk = weighted sum with critical=40, high=10, medium=4, low=1; open and deferred at full weight, patched at half weight, verified and unscanned at zero.
The total vulnerability count across all five pools is conserved; actions only move them between pools.
Every action advances the day counter by one; unknown actions are no-ops that still advance time.

emit.report: Day {day}: risk={risk} | open={open_total} patched={patched_total} deferred={deferred_total} verified={verified_total} unscanned={unscanned_total}
